sentences.arabic: شَعَرْتُ بِصُدَاعٍ شَدِيدٍ أَمْسِ فَذَهَبْتُ إِلَى الصَّيْدَلِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Jučer sam osjetio jaku glavobolju, pa sam otišao u apoteku.
sentences.translationEn: Yesterday, I felt a severe headache, so I went to the pharmacy.

sentences.arabic: أَعْطَانِي الصَّيْدَلَانِيُّ بَعْضَ الدَّوَاءِ وَشَرَحَ لِي التَّعْلِيمَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Farmaceut mi je dao lijek i objasnio mi upute.
sentences.translationEn: The pharmacist gave me some medicine and explained the instructions to me.

sentences.arabic: تَنَاوَلْتُ الدَّوَاءَ بَعْدَ العَشَاءِ وَنِمْتُ بَاكِرًا.
sentences.translation: Popio sam lijek nakon večere i rano zaspao.
sentences.translationEn: I took the medicine after dinner and went to sleep early.

sentences.arabic: اليَوْمَ، أَشْعُرُ بِتَحَسُّنٍ كَبِيرٍ مُقَارَنَةً بِأَمْسِ.
sentences.translation: Danas se osjećam mnogo bolje u poređenju sa jučerašnjim danom.
sentences.translationEn: Today, I feel much better compared to yesterday.
